title: Shaymore
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Shaymore |region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square N-14 in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]. |sector=[[Immerian Outback/Legends|Immerian Outback]] |system=[[Shaymore system/Legends|Shaymore system]] |coordinates=N-14 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna=[[Amphibious wolf]]{{WEGCite|story=Rings of Bright Water|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)}} |otherlife= |species=[[Sessehshellah]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym=Sessh' |cities=[[Sesseh' village]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|My people will never submit to the rule of the Emperor's craven bureaucrats.''"
"''Yeah? Well, when the Imperials are finished with your lovely little planet, it's gonna smell like something outta the ''Dorion Discus's'' autokitchen.''"
"''But armed with the Alliance weapons in your hold, my people will be a force to be reckoned with.|A [[Sessehshellah]] and a crewmember of the ''[[Dorion Discus]]''|}} The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] '''Shaymore''' was located in the [[Immerian Outback/Legends|Immerian Outback]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Otter/Legends|otter]]–like [[Sessehshellah]] [[Species/Legends|species]], and was [[Mining/Legends|mined]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] for [[hydrocarbon]]–based fossil fuels. The Sessehshellah, with help from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], took up arms against the Imperial invaders. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Rings of Bright Water|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Shaymore }} [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Immerian Outback locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Expansion Region]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Shaymore locations]] }}
